overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit Night City market area at night. The character stops at a food stall, then proceeds up stairs and along a coastal city street with palm trees and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with food vendors

events.description: character stops walking and stands at food stall to look at menu
character resumes walking away from the stall

agents.ego_description: approaches the yellow food stall, stops to examine the menu board, then turns and walks away

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food stall counter
customer in blue shirt standing at the stall counter

entered.detail: food vendor stall with yellow counter and overhead lighting
vertical red neon sign with Japanese characters on building facade
tight corridor walls with various storefronts and signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow neon-lit market alley toward a yellow food stall. She stops to examine the menu while a vendor and customer stand at the counter, then turns and walks away from the stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stairway leading to upper level

events.description: exits narrow market alley into open plaza area with benches
character begins ascending concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: walks through the open plaza toward a flight of concrete stairs and climbs to the upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to elevated walkway
large illuminated advertisement screen showing video content
concrete seating arranged in the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: Leaving the market behind, the character enters an open plaza with concrete benches and a large digital billboard. She approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase, transitioning from the lower market level to an upper promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal city street with palm trees and vehicle traffic

events.description: exits covered colonnade onto open coastal street with palm trees
futuristic vehicles drive past on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: walks along the coastal sidewalk passing palm trees and parked cars, with neon-lit buildings on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the coastal street
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb
modern building with teal and orange neon accent lighting
multi-lane street with moving traffic and reflective wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the upper level colonnade, the character enters an open coastal street lined with palm trees and futuristic parked cars. She walks along the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the wet reflective road, with neon-lit modern buildings rising on the left and a large digital billboard visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, neon-lit market alleyway into an expansive, open coastal promenade. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow corridor toward a yellow food stall, where she pauses briefly before turning away from the vendor. As she leaves the market behind, the scene opens into a wide concrete plaza dominated by a large digital billboard, leading the camera upward as she ascends a broad staircase to a higher elevation. The environment then shifts from the enclosed urban lower level to a breezy coastal street lined with palm trees and futuristic parked cars. Finally, the camera follows her along a wet, reflective sidewalk past towering modern buildings and another glowing billboard under the night sky.
